title: Mask JDH
description:
Have you always wanted to wear a JDH mask? With this texture pack you can do it!

Now the carved pumpkin is replaced with a mask and you can put it on
body:
I made a texture pack where the pumpkin is replaced with a JDH mask, while the pumpkin itself does not change.

![Mask JDH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6d92aeab74d3abdc2df95d23f11e0168c19b120.png)

Do not pay attention to the fact that it writes to a newer version, works in all specified versions, maybe even lower.
